name: Atai Beckley N.V.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company on a mission to develop highly effective mental health treatments to transform patient outcomes. Founded in 2018, atai emerged from the urgent need for better mental health solutions for patients who are under-served by current treatment options.
